blurb.en: Across all three pools, BTC-USD is showing the strongest entry signal right now. It has retraced 49.4% from its peak, with RSI at the 0th percentile — historically one of the better setups for a Smart DCA trigger. Formula score: 99.8/100.

blurb.en: MA has dipped 21.3% off its 52-week high — meaningful for a name of this size and stability. With RSI at just the 8th percentile, momentum is compressed. Smart DCA score: 72.3/100.

blurb.en: COIN is down 61.1% from its high, placing RSI at the 20th historical percentile. Growth names can swing hard — this kind of reset is where our formula tends to find value. Entry score: 89.8/100.

blurb.en: SOL-USD has pulled back 70.5% with RSI at the 0th percentile — a combination that historically precedes recoveries in this asset class. Not your typical recommendation. Smart DCA score: 99.8/100.
blurb.zh: SOL-USD 回撤 70.5%，RSI 百分位 0%。這種組合在此類資產的歷史中常出現在反彈前夕。非典型推薦，公式評分：99.8/100。
